texto: It was a vow we made those long years ago. Neither of us spoke of it afterwards, but it hung between us like a spider web, fragile and easy to break, but danged hard to get shed of once the threads took hold.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Cassie Dandridge Selleck: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “It was a vow we made those long years ago. Neither of us spoke of it afterwards, but it hung betw…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, loyalty, promises pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de promises e vows.

frase_original: It was a vow we made those long years ago. Neither of us spoke of it afterwards, but it hung between us like a spider web, fragile and easy to break, but danged hard to get shed of once the threads took hold.
